title: Session TTL expires immediately for long-running dashboard session
description: [prod] User authenticates successfully, but callback processing replays stale nonce and redirects back to login.
repro_steps: Open affected flow and capture request/response ids.
Repeat in target environment with fresh session.
Compare observed behavior against expected entitlement/auth state.
expected: System should return successful result with stable state transition and no redirect loop.
actual: Request completes with incorrect state and requires manual retry or produces incorrect evidence.
resolution_good: Added JWT clock-skew tolerance and synchronized auth service NTP drift checks.
Aligned cookie domain/path with callback host and enforced SameSite policy.
root_cause_good: Session cookie scope and callback nonce validation diverged across regions.

title: Stripe webhook replay creates duplicate credit adjustments
description: [local] Webhook delivery retries arrive out of order and idempotency key collision handling is inconsistent.
repro_steps: Open affected flow and capture request/response ids.
Repeat in target environment with fresh session.
Compare observed behavior against expected entitlement/auth state.
expected: System should return successful result with stable state transition and no redirect loop.
actual: Request completes with incorrect state and requires manual retry or produces incorrect evidence.
resolution_good: Added webhook idempotency lock keyed by event id and invoice id.
Reconciled plan state transition with invoice finalization workflow.
root_cause_good: Webhook idempotency key was dropped in retry worker.
resolution_bad: Increased timeout everywhere to hide failures.
root_cause_bad: Operator assumed nearest visible symptom was causal.
bad_reason: Treats symptom not cause; latency budget regression remains unresolved.

repro_steps: Open affected flow and capture request/response ids.
Repeat in target environment with fresh session.
Compare observed behavior against expected entitlement/auth state.
expected: System should return successful result with stable state transition and no redirect loop.
actual: Request completes with incorrect state and requires manual retry or produces incorrect evidence.
resolution_good: Verified Okta callback redirect URI per environment and rotated stale client secret.
Aligned cookie domain/path with callback host and enforced SameSite policy.
root_cause_good: Session cookie scope and callback nonce validation diverged across regions.
resolution_bad: Restarted service repeatedly until issue looked resolved.
root_cause_bad: Operator assumed nearest visible symptom was causal.
bad_reason: Correlation not causation: restart masked timing issue without fixing root cause.
